title: Blahaj cod
description: Turns your cod into the infamous ikea shark (5 variations)
body:
EMF OR OPTIFINE REQUIRED!!!

adds 5 different IKEA Blahaj variants in place of cod: 

to get variations beyond the pink and blue one rename the fish to (case sensitive (either capital letter first or no capital letters)):

-employment (for employed haj)

-shef (for shark with paper hat)

-dave (for shark with dave)

or try

-pinky to turn your shark pink semi-permanently

-bluey to turn your shark blue semi-permenently

Makes the bucket 3d so you can look at your shark friend

Makes the cod spawn egg an ikea shopping bag

Rename cod to meatball for swedish meatballs (frozen and cooked)
